Multi-entry trend following on TXF full session 6K bars. Strategy D027_6KAM_MID_TREND_DO. 4 entry mechanisms: (1) candle formation breakout on trend side, (2) pullback reentry above trend pivot, (3)/(4) continuation after pullback. 4 exit types: 100pt profit target, high/low boundary, time-based at 3hr/3.5hr, dynamic trailing 500pt drawdown. Linear regression dual-MA crossover on FITX 5min. Strategy 002_Sw_D_5min_Linear. LR1=raw linear regression, LR2=smoothed LR. Entry when LR diff > N threshold AND consecutive N bars increasing AND close > LR2. Also trades intraday relative high/low breakouts. SL=55pt. WF stable 2016-2020 with params len=16, N=13, sl=55.

Three-price level breakout on TXF 5min. Strategy G003_TX_LT_3Prices. Three reference lines: ML(mid), HL(high band), LL(low band). Entry conditions: no uptrend, no existing long exit signal, price not at last high. Long when price > HL with expanding candle or contracting candle. Exit: price vs band relationship, trailing stop at win_pts*(1-tb), fixed STP stop. WF 2013-2020.

3-high 3-low breakout long-only on TXA 1H. Strategy H054_TXA_3H3L_LO_1H. Entry: 3-bar high minus 3-bar low > H3L3 threshold (180pt), enter at lowest low of recent Enlen bars. Exit: SL=170pt hard stop, PF=840pt profit target, MaxPP=360pt trailing drawdown reversal. WF stable 2014-2020. Overnight hold allowed.

Box breakout with RSI filter on TXF 5min (long-only 多單). Strategy 009_TX_Box_FDT0_Jack. Main logic: time-box breakout with RSI momentum confirmation. 3 entry modes: standard breakout, counter-entry after 2-bar low, re-entry after SL with RSI still bullish. 5 exit modes: personal trailing, fixed SL, time-based, fixed profit, EOD. Drawdown control: skip entries if DD > 75000. ADR time filter to avoid anomalies.

Keltner Channel + CCI breakout on FITX 30min. Strategy khsu_CFExTest_202010_KcCCI. Entry: price above KC upper band AND CCI > 100 → long; price below KC lower band AND CCI < -100 → short. Avoid first and last bar entries. Simple 2-condition system WF by net profit. Exit: price crosses back through KC bands.

MACD crossover with Keltner trend filter on TXF 5min (long-only 廣進). Strategy CL012_TX_MACD_LO. Entry1: MACD cross up while MACD < 0 and close > open → long. Bollinger Band breakout with momentum confirmation on TXF 30min. Strategy 513_Bollinger_band. Entry: 3 consecutive bars breaking upper band with expanding range → long; 3 bars below lower band with expanding range AND previous trade not losing short → short. Exit1: close touches midband. Exit2: if profit > threshold use outer bands as exit. Exit3: time-based after breakout bars.

Time-filter channel breakout on FITX 5min (日盤當沖). Strategy 045_TX_BY_DO. Logic: enter long at daily high pivot, enter short at daily low pivot, tracked across mp=0 session reset. Exit: fixed bars, daily pivot cross, EOD. Parameterized len/aa/BB/notin with walk-forward date overrides from 2014 to 2020. Cost $600, max 1 contract.

Candlestick shadow ratio strategy on TXA 60min (long-only). Strategy No25_TXA_CandleShadow_60K_LO. Entry at next candle close confirming direction. Exit: low of entry bar as SL. WF 2013-2020, cost $1000.

Triple confirmation trend-follow on TX 13min (long-only 日盤). Strategy 010_3G_D. Core: 3 trend filters must align — momentum expansion, breakout bar geometry, counif time-based trend count. Entry: only one trade per day allowed at first valid bar. Exit1: trailing 30pt stop. Exit2: ATR dynamic. Exit3: pattern reversal. Unique counif logic prevents overtrading in choppy sessions.

Two-week momentum intraday strategy on FITX 3min (日盤當沖). Strategy TX_TwoWeek_DO. Entry L1 (main): MTM momentum + position above Keltner band in 0930-1045 window. Entry L2 (secondary): ATR channel expansion in 0900-1100 window. Re-entry L2 after drawdown <100pts. Exit: 30pt fixed stop, ATR trailing after 2nd entry, Keltner breach, 1330 forced close. CDP pivot-based momentum day-trade on TXF 1min (日盤當沖). Strategy P_CDP_TXF_1_DT_V2. Uses CDP as bias control; records 0845-0930 range. Long if gap-up open AND price breaks 0930 high; short if gap-down AND price breaks 0930 low. Exits: fixed profit SP (180), fixed SL, max-profit drawback RT (160), EOD close. Clean 3-parameter design with high R:R bias.

Gap-based intraday trend strategy on TAIEX 7-min bars with two entry modes: Entry 1 targets gap-down opens with strong first bar candle body position; Entry 2 targets gap-up opens above yesterday upper zone with continuation confirmed after n bars. RSI-based 7-min TAIEX day-trade (No22_TX_RSI_7K_DO) with optimization ranges Len (13:21:2), Bias (4:8:1), NRatio (fixed 4.3), STP (fixed 95). BSPower strategy (whw013) on TAIEX 8-min bars counting bars where close+high exceeds previous close+high as a buy-power metric. Counter-trend day-trade strategy for TAIFEX that fades gap opens: enters long when today open is below prior close (gap-down) and intraday price has pulled back by ratio of retracement, or short on gap-up reversals. AVgirl D0 5-min bar strategy tracking intraday high/low formation timing: records bar index when H equals HighD(0) and L equals LowD(0), then triggers entries when the extreme updates late in session between bars in and in2. Uses swing structure (LowestBar vs Lbar) and gap-open direction filter for secondary entries, exits trail prior day low/high. Captures timing-of-day alpha by tracking when the daily extreme forms.

KD (Stochastic) based TAIFEX 5-min day-trade strategy. Computes RSV/SK/SD slow stochastic and enters long when both K and D are above overbought threshold X=84 in morning session; exits when SK falls below Y=23 or on 7% profit target from open. WF len/X/Y parameters evolve across 2015-2020 showing stochastic thresholds used as entry rather than just exit signals, momentum-reversion dual-use architecture.

DayWave TopBot strategy (6-min bars) uses gap size filter: if open vs prior close gap exceeds 80 pts uses jump-in mode tracking intraday top/bottom formation; otherwise uses different logic. Tracks top_value/bot_value as first-bar extremes plus/minus 1 tick; entries limited to morning session (t<=1100). Uses prior-day close position within day range and open vs prior close for direction bias. Classic gap-conditional dual-mode day-trading architecture.

Parabolic SAR trend-following strategy on TAIFEX 6-min day-trade. Uses ParabolicSAR(0.02, 0.2) signal combined with gap-open direction: enters long only on gap-up open with SAR bullish and prior bars showing bullish close. Exits on fixed N-point stop loss (90-120 pts) or when LowestBar of lows during trade exceeds 70% of bars elapsed. Demonstrates combining trend indicator (SAR) with opening gap direction as dual confirmation plus time-decay exit logic.

RSI-of-Score strategy: assigns +1/0/-1 score per bar based on close vs prior close, sums over Len bars, then computes RSI of that SumScore rather than RSI of price directly. Enters long when RSI(SumScore) crosses above 50+Bias (momentum confirmation), exits on cross back; WF Len/Bias stable at 17/7 since 2017. This double-smoothing innovation (RSI applied to binary trend score) is an original indicator design insight producing a smoother momentum signal.

BSPower (Bull/Bear Strength) 8-min day-trade strategy: counts bars where (C+H) exceeds (C[1]+H[1]) as bull-power vs bear-power; enters long when bull-power count exceeds bear-power by in-factor AND close is above ratio-blend of prior high/close. Adaptive stop tightens on adverse first-bar close (bad-entry detection), trailing exit uses LowestBar of lows since entry. Novel composite (C+H) relative strength as momentum filter with dynamic bad-entry stop management.

PVG (Pivot Grid) 9-min TAIFEX strategy: computes 6-level pivot grid (H3/H2/H1/L1/L2/L3) with adjustable ratio expanding the H-L range. Three distinct entry tiers per direction: breakout above H3 with pullback confirmation, inside H2-H3 zone using SwingHigh pattern, inside H1-H2 zone using accelerating average of highest-high. Maximum 1 entry per day. Exemplifies multi-level pivot zone trading with pattern-specific entry logic per zone combining pivot levels, swing detection, and momentum confirmation.
